Provençal Chic & Modern

CANNOISE GUESTROOM

Sun-drenched guestroom with a view of the basin, chic Provençal style and Cannes star glamour

  1. Home
  2. ›
  3. Rooms
  4. ›
  5. Cannoise Guestroom

Sun-drenched and very bright, this guestroom has direct access from the garden where you will find your table and chairs to enjoy the peaceful surroundings in the shade of the chestnut tree. From a deckchair, you can admire the goldfish in the water lily-covered basin.

This junior suite will delight you with its mix of styles and colours: the decoration evokes the artists of the French Riviera and the Cannes Film Festival.

Covering 36 m², it features a bedroom with a King Size bed (180×200), a sitting area, a desk, a walk-in shower and a separate toilet. The charm of the old has been preserved with original floor tiles and exposed beams. For extra comfort and warmth, the bedroom and sitting area floors are oak parquet.

Room Equipment

Surface: 36 m² — 1 bedroom with sitting area — Ground floor

King Size bed
Nespresso coffee
Walk-in shower
Air conditioning
Tea and herbal teas
Separate WC
Free Wi-Fi
Mini Fridge
Hair dryer
Flat screen TV
Mineral water
Bathrobes
International channels
Optional beverages
Slippers
Safe
Outdoor area
Local amenities
Living-sitting area
Free Parking
Pool towels
Desk

Mas du Chanoine

Charming guesthouse in Saint-Paul de Vence, French Riviera. A 17th century farmhouse with modern comfort.
